notes: Live pnpm run blocked by hostfxr.dll 0x80070005 (known in Failures.md). Analysis uses captured runs + static source reads. _-prefixed imports absent in current tree (historical). Optionals in catalogTypes + unguarded use in consumers at time of runs. Schemas now exported.
evidence_integrity: Used only existing run artifacts + read/grep; no suppression of logs.
